---
# =============================================================================
#  CV PAGE  (currently hidden — `nav: false`)
# =============================================================================
#  al-folio supports auto-generated CV pages from a YAML file. We hide this
#  page until Dr. Golmohammadi provides a structured CV or a PDF.
#  To enable:
#    1. Add /assets/json/resume.json (JSON Resume format) OR
#       /_data/cv.yml (rendercv format), OR
#       drop a PDF in /assets/pdf/ and set `cv_pdf` below.
#    2. Set `nav: true` to add it to the top nav.
# =============================================================================
layout: cv
permalink: /cv/
title: CV
nav: false
nav_order: 99
# cv_pdf: /assets/pdf/Golmohammadi_CV.pdf
cv_format: rendercv # options: rendercv, jsonresume
description: Curriculum Vitae of Dr. Golmar Golmohammadi.
toc:

---
